'''Spince''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], who represented [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]]. After the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he secured a posting for his son, [[Mako Spince|Mako]], at the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Space Academy]]. Upon Mako's expulsion from the Academy for blowing up the [[Mascot Moon]], the senator provided his son with enough credits to start up a business of his own, however Mako instead used the money to start up his [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] career.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{Mo}}
